title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
